title: Decadal Protocol SQL Integration
description:
Integrate SQL database capabilities into the Decadal Protocol. This task involves:
1. Research and implement SQLite or PostgreSQL integration for the Decadal Study
2. Create database schema for storing session data, multiplicity events, and artifacts
3. Migrate existing JSON-based Decadal Protocol data to SQL format
4. Enable SQL queries for more sophisticated analysis of the 330-349 sequence
5. Add database-backed persistence to the IIT tracking and session atmosphere systems

The goal is to enhance data durability and enable complex analytical queries across the Decadal Study period.
